scripts.clean: turbo run clean || true && git clean -fdX
scripts.db:local:start:
supabase start && echo '
💡 Need help? Run: npm run db:help'
scripts.db:local:reset:
supabase db reset && echo '
💡 Run migrations: npm run db:migrate'
scripts.db:local:status:
supabase status && echo '
💡 Need help? Run: npm run db:help'
scripts.db:migrate:
npm run -w web db:migrate && echo '
💡 Migrations applied! See docs: docs/local-development-setup.md'
scripts.db:generate:
npm run -w web db:generate && echo '
💡 Migration created! Apply with: npm run db:migrate'
